# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-control-plane
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      accessLogEncoding: TEXT
      accessLogFile: '/dev/stdout'
  components:
    ingressGateways:
    - name: istio-ingressgateway
      namespace: istio-system
      enabled: true
    egressGateways:
    - name: istio-egressgateway
      namespace: istio-system
      enabled: true
    istiodRemote:
      enabled: true
    pilot:
      enabled: true
      k8s:
        env:
        - name: ENABLE_ENVOY_ADMIN_ACCESS
          value: "true"
  values:
    gateways:
      istio-ingressgateway:
        debug: INFO
      istio-egressgateway:
        debug: INFO
    global:
      logging:
        level: "default:info"
      proxy:
        accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
        accessLogEncoding: "TEXT"
    pilot:
      traceSampling: 100.0
